ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "about_me" TEXT /* User's bio or about me section */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Time when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "email_verified_at" TEXT /* Time when the user's email was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Time when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged in */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged out (optional) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Session token for the login session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auth_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the token */,
  "token" TEXT /* Authentication token */,
  "token_expiration" TEXT /* Time when the token expires */,
  "token_type" TEXT /* Type of token (e.g., session, refresh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auth_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Time when the request was made */,
  "reset_time" TEXT /* Time when the password was reset (optional) */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Password reset token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time when the activity was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, profile update) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who attempted to log in */,
  "attempt_time" TEXT /* Time when the attempt was made */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Whether the attempt was successful */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_auth" (
  "auth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media auth entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the social media account */,
  "social_media_platform" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "social_media_id" TEXT /* ID of the social media account */,
  "social_media_token" TEXT /* Token for the social media account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_auth_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "two_factor_auth" (
  "auth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each two-factor auth entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the two-factor auth code */,
  "auth_code" TEXT /* Two-factor authentication code */,
  "auth_expiration" TEXT /* Time when the code expires */,
  "auth_method" TEXT /* Method used for two-factor authentication (e.g., SMS, authenticator app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_two_factor_auth_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_recovery" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the recovery code */,
  "recovery_code" TEXT /* Account recovery code */,
  "recovery_expiration" TEXT /* Time when the code expires */,
  "recovery_method" TEXT /* Method used for account recovery (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_recovery_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security question */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the security question */,
  "question" TEXT /* Security question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the security question */,
  "hint" TEXT /* Hint for the security question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_questions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time when the action was performed */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
